_description: Ancient alien ruin defenders. All identical profile. Cannot be Stunned. Fearless (immune to Panic). Directional force screen grants 6+ Save vs ranged only (not brawling). Rapid Fire mode after scoring a hit.

force_screen.description: 6+ Saving Throw against all weapons fire, including weapons that would normally negate Saving Throws. They do not receive this protection against Brawling hits.

rapid_fire.trigger: A Sleeper that scores a hit when firing immediately enters Rapid Fire mode.
rapid_fire.effect: On next activation, it will not move but will fire with 1 additional shot (2 for Beam, 3 for Heavy Beam).
rapid_fire.exit_condition: If no targets are visible, it leaves Rapid Fire mode but does not otherwise move or act.
rapid_fire.persist: If it has targets, it remains in Rapid Fire mode.
rapid_fire.reminder: A suitable counter can be placed next to the figure to remind you.
